EXPERIENCE

Associate Product Manager, Notion — 2024 to Present
- Owned the AI writing assistant onboarding tour; +18% activation among new free users.
- Ran 12 customer interviews to scope a Q3 templates project; shipped 3 of 5 proposed features.
- Coordinated weekly syncs across design, ML, and growth squads.

Product Analyst, Atlassian — 2022 to 2024
- Built dashboards tracking activation across Jira Cloud onboarding; surfaced a 22% drop-off step.
- Partnered with PM on a redesign that recovered 9pp of activation over two quarters.

Software Engineer Intern, Google — Summer 2021
- Wrote internal tooling for the Search Quality team; no public-facing impact.
